What the AI world is talking about

LIVE · 27 MAR 2026
#1
Arc prize foundation

ARC-AGI-3 resets frontier AI scoreboard at 0.37%

François Chollet's ARC Prize Foundation released ARC-AGI-3, where humans solve 100% of tasks but top AI models score below 1%. Google's Gemini Pro leads at just 0.37%, followed by GPT and Claude models all scoring under 0.5%.

Google's Gemini Pro scored highest at just 0.37% on the new benchmark

Google

Google's TurboQuant cuts LLM memory costs by 6X

Google released TurboQuant, a compression algorithm that reduces LLM cache memory by 6X and delivers 8X faster computations with zero accuracy loss. If scalable, this could drastically reduce AI inference costs across the industry.

Reduces LLM cache memory by 6X with 8X faster computations and zero accuracy loss

Meta's TRIBE v2 predicts human brain activity better than fMRI

Trained on 1,000+ hours of brain data from 700+ subjects, expanding from 1,000 to 70,000 brain regions

Apple

Apple opens Siri to rival AI models in iOS 27

Apple plans to let users choose which AI models handle their Siri queries through 'Extensions' settings, ending ChatGPT's exclusive integration. Users can route questions to different models while Apple takes a cut of AI subscriptions.

ChatGPT integration usage has been 'minimal' according to Bloomberg reporting

#8
Wikipedia

Wikipedia bans AI-generated articles outright

English Wikipedia prohibited AI from writing articles, though AI can still be used for refinement and translation. The decision stems from LLM-generated content violating Wikipedia's core policies on neutrality, verifiability, and attribution.

AI can be used to refine or translate articles, but not write them from scratch

Dabus/stephen thaler

Supreme Court dodges AI copyright question

The U.S. Supreme Court declined to hear a landmark case about whether AI-generated art can be copyrighted, letting lower court rulings stand that only humans can be authors. The case involved Stephen Thaler's AI system DABUS and artwork it created in 2018.

The AI system created artwork in 2018, years before mainstream AI adoption
